name: Aid
description: Choose up to three creatures within range. Each target's Hit Point maximum and current Hit Points increase by 5 for the duration. Engine: cast on self, the +5 (+5 per slot level above 2) raises the caster's HP maximum and current HP for the encounter; the bonus is reversed on a Long Rest (the 8-hour duration). Multi-target (allies) is descriptive.
scaling: Each target's Hit Points increase by 5 for each spell slot level above 2.
